DP.409.0000:
[0103,0000]: Hey! [0103,0001]!
Tell me you got a little tougher!\f
Me? Do you even need to ask?
Of course I got tougher!\f
Come on!
Let’s battle it out!\f
DP.409.0001:
[0103,0000]: Waah!
What do you mean I lost?!\f
Well, that’s it!
That’s the last time I’ll ever lose!\f
I’m going to be the world’s toughest
Trainer, and you know it!\f
The first thing to do is take on
the Oreburgh City Pokémon Gym!\f
I’m gonna toughen up for that,
totally!\f
DP.409.0002:
Did you know?\f
The first Pokémon to appear in
a battle is the one at the top left\r
of your team list.
DP.409.0005:
Trainer Tips!\f
If a Pokémon is about to evolve,
it can be instantly stopped.\f
Press the B Button during evolution
to startle the Pokémon into stopping.\f
That is how evolution can be
canceled.
DP.409.0006:
Trainer Tips!\f
Pokémon moves use energy called
Power Points, or PP for short.\f
If the PP of moves runs low, head for
any Pokémon Center.
